### 🌿 About Me

- 🎓 I'm a **Data Science student** at the **Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City (IUH)**
- 💻 Currently building a **Portfolio & CV Hub** platform & **AI Data Analysis Agent**
- 🌱 I'm currently learning **Apache Airflow**, **Docker**, and **Data Pipelines**

</td>
